motivation: Prior experiments tested J-lens readout from the LAST TOKEN's K/V projections (V: 0.92x null, K: 1.12x null). But concepts enter the sequence at specific positions — the token where 'boot-shaped country' is mentioned, not where 'is' is about to be generated. This experiment tests whether concept-carrying positions have higher J-lens alignment in K/V than non-carrying positions.
hypotheses: H1: Concept-carrying positions show higher J-lens lift in K-space than non-carrying positions (diff > 0.5x)
H2: Concept-carrying positions show higher J-lens lift in V-space than non-carrying positions (diff > 0.5x)

H3: Concept-carrying positions show higher J-lens lift in the residual stream than non-carrying positions (positive control — J-lens should read concepts from the residual stream at positions where they are active)
H4: Fabricated-entity probes show NO position-specific signal (negative control — fabricated entities should not produce concept-localized cache patterns)

falsification_threshold.H1_H2: If concept-vs-non-concept lift difference < 0.2x in both K and V, concepts are NOT position-specifically cached
falsification_threshold.H3_positive_control: If residual stream also shows no position-specific signal, the J-lens directions are not concept-discriminative at ANY position — methodology failure, not a cache finding
falsification_threshold.H4_negative_control: If fabricated entities ALSO show position-specific signal, the signal is entity-recognition difficulty, not concept caching

design.per_position_measurement: J-lens R² in residual stream, K-space (via W_K projection), and V-space (via W_V projection)
design.position_classification: Concept-carrying positions identified by token-matching the concept-region phrase in the tokenized prompt

connection_to_prior_work.last_token_null: V-cache 0.92x and K-cache 1.12x — both null at the LAST token. This experiment tests per-position instead.
connection_to_prior_work.kv_superadditivity: Nexus showed K+V superadditive (0.333+0.333->1.000). If concepts are position-specific in BOTH K and V, the superadditivity may be position-aligned: K at position p routes, V at position p delivers, and their interaction at position p reconstructs the concept.
connection_to_prior_work.anthropic_gwt: J-space carries 6-7% of variance but 59% of causal swap effect. Small signals direct large flows. Position-specific caching would mean the small signal is LOCALIZED.

threats_to_validity: T1: Concept-region identification is approximate (token-level matching). Some concept tokens may be missed or non-concept tokens included. MITIGATION: Manual verification of position assignments in output.

T2: Position effects independent of concepts. Early positions may have different K/V structure than late positions regardless of content. MITIGATION: Compare concept positions to non-concept positions at SIMILAR sequence positions (not just all non-concept positions).

T3: The fabricated-entity control may not be clean — the model may process fabricated names similarly to real names at the entity-recognition level. MITIGATION: If fabricated probes show the same pattern as factual, the signal is entity-processing, not concept-caching. Report this as a finding, not a failure.
T4: GQA compression (4x) applies equally to all positions. MITIGATION: If we find signal despite 4x compression, the signal is strong enough to survive compression position-specifically.

known_kills_check.C2: N/A — fixed directions from fitted lens, not from test data
known_kills_check.C3: Same code path for concept and non-concept positions
